message:
🌱 Add atlantis: /api/plan does not create workspace if it does not exist mission (#1163)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-2949-api-plan-does-not-create-workspace-if-it-does-not-exist",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: /api/plan does not create workspace if it does not exist",
+    "description": "/api/plan does not create workspace if it does not exist. This issue affects 21+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\n### Community Note\n\n* Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for /api/plan does not create workspace if it does not exist",
+        "description": "## what\n\nFix https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2949 by cloning the working dir before processing plan/apply api call.\n\n## why\n\nAs reported in https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2949, when calling plan/apply from api, if the target workingdir has not been cloned by atlantis,\n```yaml\n{\"Repository\":\"jamengual/atlantmos\",\"Ref\":\"main\",\"Type\":\"Github\",\"PR\":0,\"Projects\":null,\"Paths\":[{\"Directory\":\"components/terraform/null-resource\",\"Workspace\":\"pepe-ue2-lab\"}]}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm /api/plan does not create workspace if it does… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## what\n\nFix https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2949 by cloning the working dir before processing plan/apply api call.\n\n## why\n\nAs reported in https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2949, when calling plan/apply from api, if the target workingdir has not been cloned by atlantis, an error occurs and plan/apply cannot be performed.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\"Repository\":\"jamengual/atlantmos\",\"Ref\":\"main\",\"Type\":\"Github\",\"PR\":0,\"Projects\":null,\"Paths\":[{\"Directory\":\"components/terraform/null-resource\",\"Workspace\":\"pepe-ue2-lab\"}]}",
+        "</details>\n\n### Environment details\n\n- Atlantis version: 0.22.2\n- Atlantis flags:\n\nAtlantis server-side config file:",
+        "Repo `atlantis.yaml` file:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "atlantis",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "atlantis"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2949",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/pull/3584"
+    },
+    "reactions": 21,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-15T06:31:51.163Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",

+  }
+}
